creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Approved (as mentor), excepted that I think that the message

"Spooles option: by default the single-threaded solver is used unless you
set the CCX_NPROC_EQUATION_SOLVER environment variable with the number of
cores you want to use."

would be better as a pkg-message. Do not write in pkg-descr after the WWW line.
